title: Refresh Meshtastic protobuf portnum subset for newer upstream apps
description: Current firmware unsupported-operation catalog is complete against the repo-pinned rust/lichen-meshtastic/proto/meshtastic/portnums.proto subset. Upstream Meshtastic protobufs define additional PortNum values not yet vendored here. Refresh the vendored protobuf subset/generator expectations, then update the Zephyr adapter unsupported-operation catalog and tests to cover any newly pinned app-visible portnums.
